senses.definition: a device that is used for listening to programs that are broadcast

examples.x: The radio program has interesting interviews.
The radio provides the latest weather updates.
They are dancing to the music on the radio.
They turned off the radio when they went to sleep.
We enjoy listening to the radio during our road trips.

senses.definition: a type of camera used for electronic motion picture acquisition, initially developed for the television industry but now commonly used in filmmaking as well
a piece of equipment used for recording voices or sounds or for making one's voice louder

examples.x: She adjusted the microphone before starting her presentation to ensure everyone could hear her clearly.
The singer stepped up to the microphone and began the performance, captivating the audience with her voice.
The microphone picked up background noise, so they had to move to a quieter room to record the podcast.
During the interview, he leaned closer to the microphone to make sure his responses were audible and clear.
The conference room was equipped with a microphone at each table, allowing all participants to contribute to the discussion.

senses.definition: an electronic equipment that is used in cinematography or sound recording which mixes different signals together and produces a single signal

a device or piece of equipment used in television production or broadcasting that allows for seamless switching between different video sources, such as cameras or pre-recorded content, during live broadcasts or recordings

a device or software that converts analog or digital audio and video signals into a compressed format suitable for transmission or storage, typically used in broadcasting, streaming, or video compression applications

examples.x: The encoder reduced the file size of the video, making it easier to upload to the website.
I need to set up the encoder before the live broadcast to ensure the video quality is good.
The audio engineer used an encoder to convert the podcast's sound into a digital format for distribution.
Before the event, the production team checked the encoder to make sure everything was ready for the live stream.

senses.definition: a device or circuit that converts an audio or video signal into a carrier signal suitable for transmission over a specific medium, such as radio waves or cable
a piece of electronic equipment used for sending electromagnetic waves carrying radio or television signals
a separate audio-visual device used in home theater systems to centralize audio and video connections, provide amplification, and enhance the audio experience
a type of antenna used to receive signals from satellites orbiting the earth, typically for television or internet services

examples.x: The satellite dish on the roof allows us to watch satellite TV channels from around the world.
We had to install a larger satellite dish to improve the signal strength for our internet connection.
The technician came to fix the satellite dish after it was damaged during a storm.
He adjusted the angle of the satellite dish to get a clearer picture on the TV.

senses.definition: an electronic device that displays the script for people who are speaking in public, or on television

examples.x: The news anchor read the script smoothly from the teleprompter, delivering the evening news with confidence.
During his speech, the politician glanced occasionally at the teleprompter to stay on track and maintain eye contact with the audience.
The actor struggled to memorize his lines, so the director decided to use a teleprompter during filming.
The teleprompter malfunctioned halfway through the broadcast, leaving the news anchor to improvise until it was fixed.
The teleprompter operator adjusts the scrolling speed of the text to match the speaker's pace and delivery.

senses.definition: a device or computer-based system that stores, manages, and delivers video content over a network, allowing for on-demand access and streaming of videos
a specialized loudspeaker designed for audio production and professional sound monitoring in recording studios, broadcast facilities, and home studios
a small, portable device that connects to a television or display to enable streaming of online content

examples.x: I bought a streaming stick so I can watch my favorite shows on the TV without needing cable.
The streaming stick was really easy to set up, and now I can watch Netflix anytime.
He plugged the streaming stick into the TV and started watching YouTube videos.
My friend gave me a streaming stick as a gift, and it works perfectly with my TV.
I don’t have a smart TV, but with a streaming stick, I can stream shows and movies just fine.

senses.definition: a device used in video production and broadcasting to manage and route video signals between different sources and destinations
a device used in audio production and sound reinforcement to manage and route audio signals between different sources and destinations

examples.x: The sound engineer used the audio router to direct the microphone signal to the speakers.
The audio router helped us connect the sound from different devices to the mixing board.
The radio station upgraded its audio router to improve the quality of sound during live shows.
They used an audio router to switch between different sound sources during the event.

senses.definition: a device that enables the streaming of digital media, such as movies, TV shows, and music, from online platforms directly to a television or other display

examples.x: I bought a streaming device so I can watch my favorite shows without cable.
I connected the streaming device to the TV, and now I can watch everything online.
With a streaming device, you can stream movies and music directly to your TV.
She plugged the streaming device into the TV to watch her favorite shows.

senses.definition: an Internet-connected electronic device that integrates with other devices or systems, offering enhanced functionality and convenience through features like remote control, automation, and data exchange
a device or piece of equipment for taking photographs, making movies or television programs

examples.x: He borrowed his friend's camera to document the event.
The camera flash helped brighten the dark room.
The detective checked the security footage from the camera.

senses.definition: a device used for making images or videos appear on a screen, wall, or other flat surfaces

examples.x: The classroom was equipped with a state-of-the-art projector, allowing teachers to display educational videos and presentations.
They set up a projector in the backyard for an outdoor movie night, casting larger-than-life images onto a white sheet hung between trees.
The conference room had a ceiling-mounted projector for business presentations, ensuring clear visibility for all attendees.
He brought his portable projector to the camping trip, turning the side of the tent into a makeshift movie theater under the stars.
The art installation used projectors to project images onto the walls of the gallery, creating an immersive visual experience for visitors.

senses.definition: an electronic device that visually presents data

examples.x: The store had a wide selection of displays, ranging from high-definition monitors to large-screen televisions.
The museum installed interactive displays to engage visitors with historical information.
The dashboard display on the car showed the current speed, fuel level, and navigation instructions.
The conference room was equipped with a large display for presentations during meetings.

senses.definition: an electronic device with a screen that receives television signals, on which we can watch programs

examples.x: The television in the living room is quite large.
The television was turned off during dinner.
We bought a new television with 4K resolution.
She turned the television on to catch the news.

senses.definition: an electronic amplification system used to broadcast sound to a large audience in public spaces

examples.x: The school used the public address system to announce the upcoming field trip.
The concert venue had a powerful public address system to make sure everyone could hear the performance.
The emergency message was broadcast through the public address system during the drill.
The public address system in the mall helped guide customers to the new store opening.
